preview: Switzerland's methodical, possession-based approach under their system will test Algeria's compact defensive shape and dangerous counter-attacking transitions, with the Swiss needing to break down a team that thrives on organization and set-piece threats. Both nations carry the weight of their continental ambitions—Switzerland seeking to finally convert their consistent qualification credentials into knockout-stage depth, while Algeria aims to recapture the continental dominance that made them Africa Cup of Nations champions in 2019.
